results.rendered_html:
akṛṣṭa a. [na. ta.] Not tilled; not drawn.
Comp.
— pacya a. [akṛṣṭe kṣetre
(pb) pacyate] growing or ripening in unploughed land, growing exuberant or wild; ˚cyā iva śasyasaṃpadaḥ  Ki. 1. 17 ; so ˚cyā oṣadhayaḥ, ˚cyaṃ aśanaṃ, dhānyaṃ &c.
— rohin = ˚pacya; bījaṃ ca bāleyamakṛṣṭarohi  R. 14. 77.
